description: Two-time Academy Award–winning French composer and one of the most prolific film scorers working today. Desplat composed the score for Greta Gerwig's Little Women and is the go-to composer for Wes Anderson, whose distinctive aesthetic shares deep artistic DNA with Gerwig's work.
